node.text: A notoriously sloppy driver attempts to survive a five-minute police pursuit in a packed GTA Online lobby. After evading the authorities, the driver must navigate across the map to reach an escape plane.
node.content-desc: A notoriously sloppy driver attempts to survive a five-minute police pursuit in a packed GTA Online lobby. After evading the authorities, the driver must navigate across the map to reach an escape plane.
GTA Has Apple Pay🍎? - play Short

When you buy every single ticket on the plane ✈️😱 - 🎥 phil.stringer - play Short
